positive: A vibrant, highly detailed, stylized celestial animal mascot, resembling a majestic lion merged with a nebula-filled cosmic creature. The creature is depicted in a powerful, symmetrical stance, radiating soft bioluminescent blues, deep purples, and glowing gold accents. The composition must be highly centralized, featuring a bold, clean silhouette against a minimal, contrasting background (like a deep indigo or charcoal). Stylization should emulate intricate mehndi designs or modern tattoo art, providing strong, readable lines suitable for apparel printing. Full-body shot, dramatic backlighting, cinematic digital painting, high contrast, clean lines, vector art quality, perfect symmetry, award-winning commercial illustration.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, text, logo, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, amateur, poor composition, cropped, muddy colors, realistic photo, grainy, oil painting, sketch
